ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the game application */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of times the action was performed */,
  "action_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the action in seconds */,
  "action_device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "action_os" TEXT /* Operating system used to perform the action (e.g., Windows, iOS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_app_name FOREIGN KEY ("app_name") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_action_name FOREIGN KEY ("action_name") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the game application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average user rating (out of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last active */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the user (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., social, gameplay, transactional) */,
  "action_category" TEXT /* Category of action (e.g., communication, progression, purchase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily engagement record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game application */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date for the engagement metrics */,
  "total_actions" INTEGER /* Total number of actions performed */,
  "unique_users" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who performed actions */,
  "average_session_length" TEXT /* Average length of a user session in minutes */,
  "bounce_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of users who bounced (left the game immediately) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_engagement_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game application */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "preference_category" TEXT /* Category of the preference (e.g., gameplay, audio, notifications) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the preference is the default value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game update */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game application */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., patch, major, minor) */,
  "update_size" INTEGER /* Size of the update in megabytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game application */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_rewards_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game application */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_leaderboards_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game application */,
  "session_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the session started */,
  "session_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the session ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
